welcome.title: Welcome to Reeeeecall!
welcome.description: The smartest way to study with flashcards. Create decks, add cards, and let our spaced repetition algorithm optimize your learning.

createDeck.title: Create Your First Deck
createDeck.description: We've prepared a sample deck for you. Click to create it!

cardTemplate.title: Your Card Templates
cardTemplate.description: These templates are already set up for you. Pick one for your cards.

addCards.title: Sample Cards Ready!
addCards.description: We've prepared sample cards for you. Add them to your deck with one click.

firstStudy.title: You're Ready to Study!
firstStudy.description: Your deck "{{deckName}}" has {{cardCount}} cards ready. Choose a study mode and start learning.

exploreMarket.title: Explore the Marketplace
exploreMarket.description: Thousands of shared decks await! Browse decks from other learners or share your own creations.
